title: More Nonsense Limerick 89
content:
There was an old person of Skye,
    Who waltz'd with a Bluebottle fly:
    They buzz'd a sweet tune, 
    To the light of the moon,
    And entranced all the people of Skye.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 89" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
